---
name: ✨ Feature Request
description: Propose a delightfully overengineered way to prove that 1 is 1
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Feature idea
What new proof, workflow, or infrastructure chaos should this repo gain?

## Why does this need to exist?
Explain the problem, joke, or deeply unnecessary engineering principle this solves.

## Proposed implementation
How would you build it? Bonus points for responsibly overexplaining the complexity.

## Complexity justification
Why is this the right amount of overengineered for a repo about proving `1 == 1`?

## Alternatives considered
What simpler, more reasonable approaches did you reject because they were not chaotic enough?

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] The feature keeps the sacred truth intact: 1 is 1.
- [ ] The implementation can be tested or verified.
- [ ] The complexity is funny, useful, or at least educational.

## Additional context
Links, examples, sketches, or lore go here.
